name: Conversation Humanization Settings
description: Controls warmth, typing pacing, confirmation language, and acknowledgment behavior to make the assistant feel like a real patient coordinator.

warmth_level.description: Controls overall human warmth in responses. Low = efficient and direct. Medium = warm but not chatty. High = extra warmth with acknowledgment phrases.

typing_indicator_enabled.description: Show typing dots before bot replies to simulate a real person typing.

typing_delay_min_ms.description: Minimum typing indicator delay in milliseconds.

typing_delay_max_ms.description: Maximum typing indicator delay in milliseconds.

confirmation_language_style.description: Style of booking confirmation language. Standard = factual. Warm = friendly with reassurance. Premium = concierge-level warmth.

tentative_confirmation_allowed.description: LOCKED: Tentative booking language is prohibited. Cannot be overridden by operators.

insurance_reassurance_phrases: We work with many plans, but coverage can vary depending on the specific plan.
We'll verify everything and follow up with you before the appointment is reconfirmed.
That way, you know what to expect ahead of time.
Totally understand — that's exactly why we verify ahead of time.
We do that so there aren't any surprises.

calendar_invite_enabled.description: When enabled, the chatbot will offer to send patients a calendar invite after booking confirmation. Only asks for email if the patient accepts.

operator_permissions.notes: Operators may tune warmth and pacing. Operators may NOT override insurance restriction policies, remove required confirmation clarity, or reintroduce tentative booking language.
